image:image.image:title: Single Delux
image:image.image:caption: Comfortable single room perfect for solo travelers.

image:image.image:title: Double Delux
image:image.image:caption: Spacious double room for couples or friends.

image:image.image:title: Family Suit
image:image.image:caption: a spacious, multi-room accommodation designed for families or groups (typically 3-5 people)
